ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-09-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Janet Pond.
Jennifer Torbolin, Esq. for Plaintiffs John Lo and Kuen Yu Hsu Fok also present, were sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Constance Finley.
Matter is under submission.
Counsel to prepare proposed judgment.
